commentary: Excited to share I just started as an apprentice at Vista Plumbing in Cranston. Looking forward to learning service work.
Hiring an apprentice for spring 2027. Residential plumbing, willing-to-learn remodel work, has-a-vehicle, fitness-cleared. Reply if you know someone.
Looking for an apprentice plumbing position in Providence RI. Career changer, two years of community college HVAC, ready to put in the work.
October copper prices: L pipe up 22 percent over August. Stock what you can.
Closing out a strong 2026 at Murray Plumbing. Thanks to the whole crew for putting in the work.
Rolling into the Elmwood kitchen project Monday. Henderson family, real one of a kind house.
